cedict_en: to break away from/to cast off (old ideas etc)/to get rid of/to break away (from)/to break out (of)/to free oneself from/to extricate oneself
to pay a visit; to call on
to pay a New Year call/to wish sb a Happy New Year
to request sb to do sth/please!
to issue/to proclaim/to enact (laws, decrees etc)
to give up halfway (idiom); leave sth unfinished
to accompany/to follow/to occur together with/concomitant
to play the role of/to act
model; example (for people to follow); (in reference to a person) role model

scale (instrument for weighing)/to weigh/(loanword) pound (unit of weight, about 454 grams)/(printing) point (unit used to measure the size of type)/(Tw) (printing) pound; ream weight (used to describe paper thickness) | used in 磅礡|磅礴[pang2 bo2]/Taiwan pr. [pang1]
